c126-pem-scope-bridge.compensating_verification: tsc clean; 18/18 desktop vitest green (5 new: 3 compileListQuery + 2 bridgeTableToGraph with injected live seam after discovering the real @electric-sql/pglite/live extension hangs any vitest pool). One real defect caught by tests: missing disposed-guard in the live callback, fixed.

c127-mobile-local-store-and-frb.compensating_verification: cargo check/clippy clean on all touched crates (26 pre-existing llama-cpp warnings, zero new); 8 gen_ui_db_graph tests green incl 2 new SurrealLocalStore boundary tests; full workspace check green excluding gen_ui_ffi (env-blocked: frb codegen times out on this cold worktree, a standing limitation — Rust/Tauri side verified via temporary local stub, never committed)

design_correction: Plan called for SqliteLocalStore on mobile; investigation found mobile config/memory store is SurrealDB (SqliteEntityStore is entity-envelope-only, a separate concern), and the crate author had already tracked this exact gap as C-106 T5 with an explicit warning against smuggling a row-persistence surface into gen_ui_db_graph without a deliberate design decision. Implemented SurrealLocalStore as a new crate-internal module (gen_ui_db_graph::sync) reached only via GraphStore::local_store() -> Arc<dyn LocalStore>, keeping the INTENT-LEVEL public boundary intact.
